attack: Fullwidth digits (U+FF10-FF19): the identifier reads as an ordinary TCKN to a clinician and matches no [0-9]{11} pattern. Each digit is three bytes, so a detector that folds the digits and then reports offsets into the folded copy emits an 11-byte span into a 33-byte run and ends inside a character. The gold span covers the ORIGINAL fullwidth digits.
text:
KARDIYOLOJI POLIKLINIK NOTU

Hasta Adi: Ayse Yilmaz
T.C. Kimlik No: １２３４５６７８９０１
Anamnez: Efor dispnesi tarifliyor, iki aydir devam ediyor.
Tetkikler: ECG'de sinus ritmi. Troponin negatif.
Plan: metformin dozu degistirilmedi, kontrol onerildi.

attack: Arabic-Indic digits (U+0660-U+0669). These do NOT NFKC-fold to ASCII - they are a distinct decimal numbering system, not a compatibility variant - so a pipeline that normalises with NFKC and stops there still sees no digits at all. The fold has to be by numeric value.
text:
DAHILIYE KONSULTASYON NOTU

Hasta: Sukru Gokce
Kimlik numarasi sistemde ٩٨٧٦٥٤٣٢١٠١ olarak kayitli.
Oykü: Tip 2 diabetes mellitus, on yildir takipli.
Sonuc: HbA1c yuksek, tedavi duzenlendi.

attack: Extended Arabic-Indic (Persian/Urdu) digits U+06F0-U+06F9 in a Turkish mobile number. Same class as the previous fixture and a second numbering system, which is the point: a table that hardcodes one range misses the next one a regional data-entry terminal produces.
text:
TABURCU OZETI

Hasta Adi: Irmak Dogan
Iletisim telefonu: ۰۵۳۲۱۲۳۴۵۶۷
Ameliyat: laparoskopik kolesistektomi, komplikasyonsuz.
Taburculuk: genel durum iyi, oral alim acildi.

attack: A ZERO WIDTH SPACE (U+200B) inside the digit run. The note renders as an eleven digit TCKN and the matcher sees a three digit run and an eight digit run, neither of which is a TCKN. The gold span covers the original bytes INCLUDING the interior zero-width character, because that is what a surrogate has to replace - leaving the fragment behind leaks half the id.
text:
NEFROLOJI POLIKLINIK NOTU

T.C. Kimlik No: 123​45678901
Hasta Adi: Elif Kara
Kreatinin 1.4 mg/dL, eGFR 58. Proteinuri saptanmadi.
Plan: uc ay sonra kontrol.

attack: Two different invisible characters splitting one identifier: a ZERO WIDTH JOINER (U+200D) and a SOFT HYPHEN (U+00AD). The soft hyphen is the important half - it is not an attack at all, it is what a word processor inserts at a line break and what PDF text extraction hands straight through, so this fixture fails on ordinary hospital input with no adversary anywhere near it.
text:
PATOLOJI RAPORU

Hasta kimlik: 4567‍8901­234
Materyal: kolon biyopsisi.
Mikroskopi: adenocarcinoma ile uyumlu bulgular izlendi.
Rapor eden: Dr. Kerem Aslan

attack: A SOFT HYPHEN inside a patient NAME rather than inside a number. Honest scope: deid-tr masks zero person names today because L2 has no trained model, so this fixture is currently a miss for reasons that have nothing to do with Unicode. It is filed now so that the day a name detector lands, the hyphenated spelling is already in the corpus and cannot be a silent gap.
text:
HEMSIRE GOZLEM NOTU

Hasta: Zey­nep Aydin
Vital bulgular stabil, ates yok. Agri skoru 3/10.
Refakatci kizi Selin Aydin gece kalacak.
Hemsire: Hems. Buse Ozturk

attack: A Turkish name whose leading A is CYRILLIC A (U+0410). It renders identically to Latin A and compares equal to nothing. Note the second letter of the surname is the GENUINE Turkish dotless i (U+0131), which a homoglyph fold must leave untouched - folding it onto Latin i would destroy the dotted/dotless distinction that I6 protects, trading a real recall signal for an imaginary one.
text:
DERMATOLOJI POLIKLINIK NOTU

Hasta Adi: Аyse Yılmaz
Sikayet: sirtta kasintili plaklar, alti aydir.
Muayene: eritemli skuamli plaklar, psoriasis ile uyumlu.
Plan: topikal kortikosteroid baslandi.

attack: GREEK capital Mu (U+039C) and Omicron (U+039F) standing in for Latin M and O in a clinician name. Greek reaches Turkish clinical text legitimately through units and notation, so a blanket 'reject Greek' rule would destroy the note; the correct handling is to fold for MATCHING and to treat the mixed-script token as a signal that escalates, never as one that demotes.
text:
AMELIYAT NOTU

Cerrah: Op. Dr. Μehmet Οaral
Hasta: Deniz Sahin
Islem: sag total diz artroplastisi.
Anestezi: spinal. Kanama miktari minimal.

attack: A RIGHT-TO-LEFT OVERRIDE (U+202E) and its terminating POP DIRECTIONAL FORMATTING (U+202C) wrapping the identifier. The override reverses the DISPLAYED order, so what a clinician reads and what the matcher sees are two different eleven digit strings. The override characters sit at the edges of the run and must stay OUTSIDE the emitted span: they are not part of the identifier and masking them would corrupt the surrounding text. A bidi override in a Turkish clinical note is essentially never innocent.
text:
ACIL SERVIS NOTU

Kimlik: ‮98765432101‬
Hasta bilinci acik, koopere. GKS 15.
Tetkik: hemogram ve biyokimya alindi.
Karar: gozlem sonrasi taburcu.

attack: A LEFT-TO-RIGHT OVERRIDE (U+202D) wrapping a person name. Same mechanism as the previous fixture applied to a name rather than a number, and the same honest caveat: no name is masked today, so this scores as a miss until L2 has a model. The Unicode half of the problem - that the span must cover the name and not the override characters - is what this fixture pins.
text:
RADYOLOJI RAPORU

Hasta: ‭Cem Yilmaz‬
Tetkik: toraks BT, kontrastli.
Bulgular: sag ust lobda 8 mm noduler dansite. Takip onerilir.
Raporlayan: Dr. Ece Tan

attack: The name is written with I + COMBINING DOT ABOVE (U+0049 U+0307) instead of the precomposed I-with-dot (U+0130) - which is exactly what NFD produces, and what a pipeline that normalises with NFD hands to everything downstream. The trap: U+0130 decomposes and U+0131 does not, so a decomposition followed by any diacritic-stripping step leaves a bare I, which is the CAPITAL OF DOTLESS i. Two of Turkish's four i letters collapse into one and the strongest name signal in the language is gone. Composition is safe; decomposition is not.
text:
NOROLOJI KONSULTASYON NOTU

Hasta Adi: İnci İlhan
Sikayet: bas donmesi, iki haftadir.
Muayene: nistagmus yok, serebellar testler normal.
MRI planlandi.

attack: The allowlist attacked from the other side. A homoglyph fold makes carcinom+CYRILLIC-a skeleton to carcinoma, which IS on the class C medical allowlist - so the fold alone would hand an attacker a deterministic Keep for any string they can disguise as a diagnosis. The required behaviour: a mixed-script token is INELIGIBLE for the allowlist short-circuit and escalates to L4 instead. Recall never loses to the allowlist (I2). The genuine adenocarcinoma in the same report must still be kept, and the fullwidth MRN must still be masked.
text:
PATOLOJI RAPORU

Protokol No: ２０２６-００１１４８２
Materyal: mide biyopsisi.
Makroskopi: carcinomа suphesi ile gonderilen materyal.
Mikroskopi: adenocarcinoma odaklari izlendi, invazyon mevcut.
Rapor eden: Dr. Yusuf Demir
